title: Hero Brians
description: A high fantasy pack featuring the RPG series of mods and several mods that enable creativity.
body:
WHAT CAN I EVEN DO?
Questing: Featuring the RPG series and several dungeon/quest mods. First, you'll want to decide which class you want to do: Archer, Rogue, Warrior, Paladin, or Cleric + Fire, Ice, and Arcane Mage. Once you've picked who you want to be, take a spellbook to a spell binding table and create your classes book. Find quests in taverns, guild halls, or the two types of bounty boards (general and hunting). You can also just walk around and find several encampments to conquer!
The End: The end of the game has been completely overhauled, including the boss fights and how you get there. Find the different eyes or suffer my curse.
The Aether: Classic. You know what it is.
The Nether: Completely overhauled with Better Nether. Expect bosses and piglin variants as well as other twists and turns.
Painting: Joy of Painting and Immersive Paintings allow you to paint pixel art or port in your own images and frame them. Arts & Crafts also features chalk and paintable blocks.
Photography: Exposure allows you to take in game photos and develop the film. You can also import photos from your PC this way.
Music: Music Maker and Immersive Melodies allow you to create and play pre-made music. You can even get mobs in on the fun, just toss them an instrument.
Botania: Natural, interactive magic tech mod. Idk how it works figure it out.
Create: It's basic create. Create.
Cooking: The Let's Do series and Bountiful Fares add plenty of new recipes to try out. Whether it's baking a whole chicken or brewing whiskey, you'll never feel wanting in the realm of food.
Atlases: Chart your findings with Map Atlas. Great for figuring out what's even happening.
Archaeology: Find fossils and ancient artifacts that can grant powerful enchantments with Better Archaeology.
Decorating: Let's Do, Supplementaries, Amendments, Clutter, and many more mods add plenty of things to decorate your home with. View the full mod list or just type things into JEI to see if they exist.
Enemy Overhauls: Expect new behaviors and enemy types overall. Spiders climbing on walls, zombies spitting goo at you, idk explore you'll find something cool to fight.
Caving/Mining: Underground exploration has been revamped with Spelunkery & Deeper and Darker. Are you up for the horrors below?
Alchemy: Extra Alchemy and Potioncraft have added new potion types and means of brewing. Try mixing potions together or even making a potion that shrinks you.
Custom Portals!!! Instead of boring waystones, we got lore accurate PORTALS that can be used to get from A to B reliably. Now we can live apart without fear of never seeing eachother again... Still maybe live together though?
Building: So much to build with. FEATURING REFRAMED!!! Shirk the limitations of your blocky overlords. Build with any texture on any block with modifiers galore!
Magic Items: An overhauled enchantments system + plenty of magical artifacts to find and wear. Heartstone is a key magic item 'cause it'll let you find your friends!
Vanilla Overhauls: Wilder Wilds, Hybrid Aquatic, and several other vanilla biomes have been overhauled completely.
Fantastical Exploration: The overworld has been jammed with high fantasy biomes featuring purple trees and pixies.
Overhauled Fishing: Tide has completely remastered fishing to make it more engaging than vanilla. Enjoy...
Special Events: Lunar adds plenty of wacky moon related events.
AND MORE!!! I'm out of characters on this message, just know there's plenty of visual overhauls and a lot of neat things to discover. K thanks bye! Like you can literally open a shop that villagers buy from. Explore the pack!!!
